description_long: This house features a compact, boxy structure with a flat roof and clean, modern lines. The exterior is predominantly white with some gray and tan accents, giving it a minimalist and contemporary appearance. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with a mix of small and medium-sized panes distributed across the facade. The main entryway is slightly recessed and marked by a small overhang, providing a subtle shelter. There is a visible chimney on one side, suggesting the presence of a fireplace inside. The house sits on a flat, open lot, emphasizing its geometric simplicity and urban suitability.
description: A compact, modern house with a flat roof, white and gray exterior, asymmetrical windows, and a recessed entryway with a small overhang.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, a small overhang, and a prominent chimney.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the asymmetrical window arrangement and tan accent wall.
description_view_2: Rear view with additional windows and a clear view of the flat roof structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more windows and the continuation of the flat roof and tan accent.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a small overhang, minimal steps, and a simple door.
